text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, it's actually happening! This<n>dopamine rush
might never end!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The race of my dreams is coming<n>true! Doto's
first G1 with Opera O...<n>My oshis are gonna run
together in a<n>G1!!!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Let's go, Trainer! It's time to wave<n>our light
sticks!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We arrive at Hanshin Racecourse,<n>where the first
face-off between T.M.<n>Opera O and Meisho Doto
is getting<n>heated.

text_block_list.name: Opera O and Doto
text_block_list.text: Daaaaah! Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O rips around from the<n>outside! Meisho
Doto is in second,<n>holding down the inside!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're lined up, and it's over! T.M.<n>Opera O
comes in first with Meisho<n>Doto right behind her in
second!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O has won the momentous<n>race by a
narrow margin.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That... wasn't divine...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It was something much more. For a<n>moment
there... when I was watching<n>my two top oshis
give their all against<n>each other...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I... even forgot how moe they are...<n>That's how
much it affected me...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Doto, you've done wellto arrive at the foot of my canopy.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This is the meeting of chance I was<n>promised. Our
tale begins here!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
None but I shall run ahead of you, and<n>none shall
outpace me but you!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O! I'm... so, so, so sorry to<n>have kept you
waiting!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But now that I've made it, I'll keep<n>moving toward
you... step by step!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I want to become... someone I can be<n>proud of!
And I... I need you for that!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So, please, run with me again... and<n>again and
again and again!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The crowd goes wild as the two<n>announce their
rivalry.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Is this... the essence of Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Or is it unique to Opera O and Doto?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My ears are getting... hot... All the<n>excitement has
gone to my head.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It must be from this fated match-up,<n>right? It must
be because they're so<n>special...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Digital, you have my thanks for<n>attending this
premiere of ours.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It's your turn next. Show us how you<n>twirl atop
the sand.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Opera O...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Do your best, Digital. I'm planning to<n>learn
something from watching you<n>run on dirt too.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
O-okay. I'm not sure I can put on a<n>race as divine
as you two...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Still, watching your show—your<n>race—has really
energized me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, we've been passed the<n>baton, and we're
up next to perform<n>in the Japan Dirt Derby. Our
search<n>for the source of Umamusume<n>greatness
continues.
